using RecipeCommunity.Models;

namespace RecipeCommunity.Services;

public class RecipeService
{
    private readonly List<Recipe> _recipes = new()
    {
        new Recipe { Id = 1, Title = "Classic Margherita Pizza", Category = "Italian", Ingredients = "Pizza dough
San Marzano tomatoes
Fresh mozzarella
Fresh basil
Olive oil
Salt", Steps = "1. Preheat oven to 475°F (245°C).
2. Roll out dough on a floured surface.
3. Spread crushed tomatoes evenly.
4. Tear mozzarella and distribute over sauce.
5. Bake for 10-12 minutes until crust is golden.
6. Top with fresh basil and a drizzle of olive oil.", AverageRating = 4.5, RatingCount = 12 },
        new Recipe { Id = 2, Title = "Chicken Tikka Masala", Category = "Indian", Ingredients = "Chicken breast
Yogurt
Garam masala
Turmeric
Cumin
Tomato sauce
Heavy cream
Garlic
Ginger
Onion", Steps = "1. Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 2 hours.
2. Grill or pan-fry chicken until charred.
3. Sauté onion, garlic, and ginger.
4. Add tomato sauce and spices, simmer 15 min.
5. Stir in cream, add chicken pieces.
6. Simmer 10 more minutes. Serve with rice.", AverageRating = 4.8, RatingCount = 24 },
        new Recipe { Id = 3, Title = "Beef Tacos", Category = "Mexican", Ingredients = "Ground beef
Taco seasoning
Corn tortillas
Lettuce
Tomato
Cheddar cheese
Sour cream
Salsa", Steps = "1. Brown ground beef in a skillet.
2. Add taco seasoning and water, simmer 5 min.
3. Warm tortillas in a dry pan.
4. Assemble tacos with beef and toppings.
5. Serve with salsa and sour cream.", AverageRating = 4.2, RatingCount = 8 },
        new Recipe { Id = 4, Title = "Pad Thai", Category = "Thai", Ingredients = "Rice noodles
Shrimp or tofu
Egg
Bean sprouts
Green onions
Peanuts
Lime
Fish sauce
Tamarind paste
Sugar", Steps = "1. Soak rice noodles in warm water 30 min.
2. Make sauce: mix tamarind, fish sauce, and sugar.
3. Stir-fry shrimp/tofu, push aside, scramble egg.
4. Add drained noodles and sauce, toss.
5. Add bean sprouts and green onions.
6. Serve with crushed peanuts and lime wedge.", AverageRating = 4.6, RatingCount = 15 },
        new Recipe { Id = 5, Title = "Chocolate Lava Cake", Category = "Desserts", Ingredients = "Dark chocolate
Butter
Eggs
Sugar
Flour
Vanilla extract", Steps = "1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Melt chocolate and butter together.
3. Whisk eggs, sugar, and vanilla until thick.
4. Fold in chocolate mixture and flour.
5. Pour into greased ramekins.
6. Bake 12-14 minutes (center should be soft).
7. Invert onto plate and serve immediately.", AverageRating = 4.9, RatingCount = 30 },
        new Recipe { Id = 6, Title = "Caesar Salad", Category = "Salads", Ingredients = "Romaine lettuce
Parmesan cheese
Croutons
Caesar dressing
Lemon juice
Garlic
Anchovy paste", Steps = "1. Wash and chop romaine lettuce.
2. Make dressing: whisk garlic, anchovy paste, lemon juice, and olive oil.
3. Toss lettuce with dressing.
4. Top with shaved Parmesan and croutons.
5. Serve immediately.", AverageRating = 3.9, RatingCount = 6 },
        new Recipe { Id = 7, Title = "Spaghetti Carbonara", Category = "Italian", Ingredients = "Spaghetti
Guanciale or pancetta
Eggs
Pecorino Romano
Black pepper", Steps = "1. Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente.
2. Crisp guanciale in a pan.
3. Whisk eggs with grated pecorino and pepper.
4. Toss hot pasta with guanciale (off heat).
5. Quickly stir in egg mixture to create creamy sauce.
6. Serve with extra pecorino and pepper.", AverageRating = 4.7, RatingCount = 19 },
        new Recipe { Id = 8, Title = "Mango Sticky Rice", Category = "Thai", Ingredients = "Glutinous rice
Coconut milk
Sugar
Salt
Ripe mango", Steps = "1. Soak sticky rice for 4+ hours.
2. Steam rice for 20-25 minutes.
3. Heat coconut milk with sugar and salt.
4. Mix half the coconut sauce into cooked rice.
5. Let rice absorb sauce for 30 min.
6. Serve with sliced mango and remaining sauce drizzled on top.", AverageRating = 4.4, RatingCount = 11 },
    };

    private int _nextId = 9;

    public IReadOnlyList<string> GetCategories()
    {
        return _recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().OrderBy(c => c).ToList();
    }

    public IReadOnlyList<Recipe> GetRecipesByCategory(string category)
    {
        return _recipes.Where(r => r.Category.Equals(category, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)).ToList();
    }

    public Recipe? GetRecipeById(int id)
    {
        return _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == id);
    }

    public IReadOnlyList<Recipe> GetAllRecipes()
    {
        return _recipes.AsReadOnly();
    }

    public void AddRating(int recipeId, int stars)
    {
        var recipe = _recipes.FirstOrDefault(r => r.Id == recipeId);
        if (recipe is null || stars < 1 || stars > 5) return;

        var totalStars = recipe.AverageRating * recipe.RatingCount;
        recipe.RatingCount++;
        recipe.AverageRating = Math.Round((totalStars + stars) / recipe.RatingCount, 1);
    }

    public void SubmitRecipe(RecipeSubmission submission)
    {
        _recipes.Add(new Recipe
        {
            Id = _nextId++,
            Title = submission.Title,
            Category = submission.Category,
            Ingredients = submission.Ingredients,
            Steps = submission.Steps,
            AverageRating = 0,
            RatingCount = 0
        });
    }
}

data.content:
The project builds successfully. Here's what was created:

**Project:** `RecipeCommunity` (Blazor Web App with Interactive Server mode)

**Structure:**
- `Models/Recipe.cs` — Recipe and RecipeSubmission models
- `Services/RecipeService.cs` — In-memory recipe store with 8 seed recipes across 6 categories
- `Components/Pages/Home.razor` — Homepage with category cards (static SSR)
- `Components/Pages/Recipes.razor` — Browse recipes by category (static SSR)
- `Components/Pages/RecipeDetail.razor` — Full recipe view with ingredients & steps (static SSR)
- `Components/Pages/StarRating.razor` — Interactive 1–5 star rating widget (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)
- `Components/Pages/SubmitRecipe.razor` — Interactive form for submitting recipes (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`)

**Key design decisions:**
- Read-only pages (Home, Browse, Detail) use default static SSR — no unnecessary JS
- Only the `StarRating` component and `SubmitRecipe` page opt into `InteractiveServer` for click/form handling
- `RecipeService` is registered as a singleton for shared state

Run with: `cd RecipeCommunity && dotnet run`
